class.name: ASNameTag
class.brief_description: Persistent identity tag for long-lasting state (State.Stunned, Class.Warrior).
class.description:
ASNameTag represents persistent identity or state tags that remain until explicitly removed. Used for character states (State.Stunned, State.Dead), class affiliation (Class.Warrior), team membership (Team.Blue), and other long-term identity markers.
These tags form the foundation of an actor's persistent identity and are typically managed through ASComponent's add_tag/remove_tag methods.
From BUSINESS_RULES.md: "Represent persistent identity or state."

method.name: create
method.description: Creates a new ASNameTag with the specified name.

method.name: STUNNED
method.description: Returns a predefined STUNNED state tag.

method.name: DEAD
method.description: Returns a predefined DEAD state tag.

method.name: INVISIBLE
method.description: Returns a predefined INVISIBLE state tag.

method.name: WARRIOR
method.description: Returns a predefined WARRIOR class tag.

method.name: MAGE
method.description: Returns a predefined MAGE class tag.

method.name: ARCHER
method.description: Returns a predefined ARCHER class tag.

constants.constant: Tag type for persistent identity tags.
